review_summary.college_name: Century International Institute of Dental Science and Research Center, Kasaragod Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not bad. It is good option for BDS. More events are there. Large patients are there.

content.Placements: In our college placements are assured by the college itself. We work in our college and as per salary, average is 6000 INR. So we can get a good experience from our college and we can study for PG in that period. The average package is 3 Lacs for one year. As normal in every college although college is private. Around 20% of students are recruited in our college itself and work in clinics as well.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay. It's based on department. Some departments have better infrastructures. But not that many facilities are there. We have no sufficient trimmer. We have to buy batch wise. Classrooms have projectors and they are not bad. The library is not that much good. Mess is average ground is not that good.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: From every aspect this college is very good for your future.

content.Placements: All students with more than average scores in NEET is admitted in this college. The fee structure is different for different students and the package varies from fifteen Lacs to twenty-five Lacs for the whole course duration that is about three and half Lacs rupees course fee plus extra hostel fee and other expenses per annum is there. There is no recruitment after the course from college. After the course we yourself have to find the jobs. Every students need to do internship of one year compulsorily after the course. After graduation, we can do work as a dental surgeon or a dentist at any private sectors or even we can start our own clinics.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely best college where we can study so much.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Our college offers best dentists to the society. There are many brilliant dentists in our college. It is due to the hardwork and dedication of our faculty members which enables us to learn more. We have best doctors to teach us.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is the first private dental college in Kerala. So our infrastructures are bit old. But campus is nice. We have best programmes as compared to other private colleges. Our arts and sports are truly wonderful where we can improve our skills.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good with good facilities.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. 80%+ students get internships, and some opt for higher studies. BDS course is a very professional course.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is less hygienic, and the facilities here are average. The departments are very clean, and the ambiance is good. The mess food is average. Good medical facilities are available. The college supports sports and arts.
content.Faculty: The teachers are qualified, helpful and very knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. They have to change the curriculum. The evaluation system is strict, and it is very difficult to pass. Every year, a good percentage of students get internships.
